title: Odoo 19+ External JSON-2 API (Migration from XML-RPC/JSON-RPC)
summary: Complete reference for the new REST-style /json/2 endpoint introduced in Odoo 19. Replaces XML-RPC and JSON-RPC (scheduled for removal in Odoo 22, fall 2028). Uses Bearer API key instead of user/password, model+method in URL, all args named in JSON body. Critical for migrating odoo-mcp-multi to support Odoo 19+.
